api/spec/packages/legacy/src/billing.purpose: TypeSpec schema-only package defining the v1 billing API surface — billing profiles, customer overrides, and invoice lifecycle endpoints/actions. The parent owns profiles/overrides/invoice-endpoints (.tsp) while the invoices/ child owns the invoice entity field shape; all files compile into api/openapi.yaml via make gen-api and carry no runtime code.

patterns.name: @friendlyName on every model, union, enum, interface
patterns.description: Every public declaration carries @friendlyName so the generator produces stable Go type names; missing it yields unstable autogenerated names that break SDK contracts.

patterns.name: @visibility lifecycle decorators on every field
patterns.description: Fields are annotated Lifecycle.Read/Create/Update; an un-annotated field defaults to all lifecycles and leaks read-only/internal state into create/update payloads.

patterns.name: @operationId on every interface operation
patterns.description: Each operation carries @operationId to produce stable Go function names in the generated stub.
patterns.example: @get @operationId("getBillingProfile") get(@path id: ULID): BillingProfile | NotFoundError | CommonErrors;

patterns.name: Discriminated unions with envelope:none for polymorphic types
patterns.description: Polymorphic types (BillingWorkflowCollectionAlignment, VoidInvoiceLineAction) use @discriminated(#{ discriminatorPropertyName: "type", envelope: "none" }); a new arm needs both the union arm AND a model with a matching type literal field.
patterns.example: @discriminated(#{ envelope: "none", discriminatorPropertyName: "type" }) union VoidInvoiceLineAction { discard: ..., pending: ... }

patterns.name: Spread (...) / OmitProperties / ResourceCreateModel for composition, not extends
patterns.description: Models compose shared fields via spread, OmitProperties<T,...>, and TypeSpec.Rest.Resource.ResourceCreateModel/ResourceReplaceModel — using extends changes generated SDK property semantics.

patterns.name: namespace OpenMeter + main.tsp as sole entry point
patterns.description: All declarations live in namespace OpenMeter; every new .tsp file must be imported in main.tsp (which also imports ./invoices/main.tsp) or it compiles in isolation and produces no output.

key_file_guides.role: Package entry point importing all sibling and the invoices/ child .tsp files; declares namespace usings.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Adding a .tsp file without a matching import here silently produces no output.

key_file_guides.role: BillingProfile, BillingProfileCreate/ReplaceUpdate, BillingWorkflow and its sub-settings, app references, and the /api/v1/billing/profiles CRUD interface.
key_file_guides.watch_for: BillingProfileReplaceUpdate uses ResourceReplaceModel<BillingProfile> — adding an uncontrolled-visibility field leaks read-only fields into the update payload.

key_file_guides.role: Customer override CRUD at /api/v1/billing/customers/{customerId} and BillingProfileCustomerOverrideWithDetails merging override + base profile.
key_file_guides.watch_for: App fields on the workflow override are @visibility(Lifecycle.Read) only — they must never appear in create/update inputs.

key_file_guides.role: Invoice endpoints across InvoicesEndpoints/InvoiceEndpoints/CustomerInvoiceEndpoints plus action input/output models (void, approve, advance, retry, snapshot-quantities, simulate).
key_file_guides.watch_for: VoidInvoiceLineAction is a discriminated union (envelope:none) — new void actions need both a union arm and a model with a matching type literal.

key_file_guides.role: Child entry importing the invoice entity sub-models (invoice.tsp, discounts.tsp, party.tsp, pay.tsp, tax.tsp, docref.tsp).
key_file_guides.watch_for: Invoice entity fields live in the invoices/ child, not in the parent invoices.tsp (which only defines endpoints + action models).

anti_patterns: Adding runtime or business logic — this folder is schema-only; logic belongs in openmeter/billing/
Editing generated files (api/openapi.yaml, api/api.gen.go) instead of the .tsp source
Omitting @friendlyName on new models, unions, or enums — yields unstable generated Go type names
Adding fields without @visibility decorators — they default to all lifecycles and leak internal state on create/update
Using extends for composition instead of spread/OmitProperties/ResourceCreateModel — changes generated property semantics

decisions.decision: Visibility-controlled single models instead of separate request/response types
decisions.rationale: @visibility lets the OpenAPI generator derive correct create/read/update schemas from one model, avoiding parallel type hierarchies.

decisions.decision: Discriminated unions with envelope:none for workflow alignment and void-action types
decisions.rationale: envelope:none inlines the discriminator, matching the Go domain types in openmeter/billing/ which use a Type string field rather than a wrapper object.

decisions.decision: BillingProfileReplaceUpdate uses ResourceReplaceModel<BillingProfile> with an explicit workflow override
decisions.rationale: ResourceReplaceModel auto-derives the update payload from read-model visibility; the explicit workflow field allows distinct update semantics without duplicating the BillingProfile tree.

api/spec/packages/legacy/src/entitlement.purpose: TypeSpec schema-only package defining the v1 entitlements API surface — subject-scoped entitlement CRUD, grant management, and customer access checks. All V1 symbols are deprecated in favour of the v2/ sub-folder; new entitlement work belongs in v2/, not here.

patterns.name: Discriminated union (envelope:none) for entitlement types
patterns.description: The Entitlement read union and EntitlementCreateInputs create union both use @discriminated(#{ envelope: "none", discriminatorPropertyName: "type" }); a new entitlement type needs a new arm in BOTH unions plus a model with a matching type literal.

patterns.name: #deprecated + #suppress pair on every V1 symbol with a V2 successor
patterns.description: Each V1 model/union/operation that has a V2 successor carries both #deprecated and #suppress; missing either causes compiler warnings that break make gen-api.
patterns.example:
#deprecated "Use EntitlementMeteredV2 instead"
#suppress "deprecated" "V1 Entitlements APIs will be removed on December 1st, 2025"

patterns.name: OmitProperties<T,...> for read-model composition
patterns.description: Response models spread OmitProperties over a base create-input type and add read-only/calculated fields, keeping create/read models in sync when the base changes.

patterns.name: @operationId on every operation
patterns.description: All operations carry @operationId for stable generated Go function names across compiler upgrades.

patterns.name: Separate interface group per URL prefix
patterns.description: Each interface maps to exactly one URL prefix (@route + @tag) so new operations do not pollute another prefix's operation set.

patterns.name: main.tsp imports all siblings + cross-package features
patterns.description: Every new .tsp must be imported in main.tsp (which also cross-imports ../productcatalog/features.tsp) or it produces no output.

key_file_guides.role: Package entry importing all sibling .tsp files plus the cross-package productcatalog/features.tsp; no declarations live here.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Forgetting an import — the file compiles in isolation but is invisible to package output.

key_file_guides.role: Entitlement and EntitlementCreateInputs unions, EntitlementSharedFields, the three per-type create inputs, and admin endpoints at /api/v1/entitlements.
key_file_guides.watch_for: A new entitlement variant must update BOTH the read union AND the create union atomically or the discriminator is incomplete.

key_file_guides.role: V1 subject-scoped entitlement CRUD and grant endpoints at /api/v1/subjects/{subjectIdOrKey}/entitlements; all deprecated.
key_file_guides.watch_for: Do not add new operations here — they belong in v2/; every operation carries #deprecated + #suppress.

key_file_guides.role: Grant, GrantCreateInput, ExpirationPeriod/Duration, and the global /api/v1/grants admin list/void endpoints; already imports @typespec/http.
key_file_guides.watch_for: New files referencing these models need import "@typespec/http" and using TypeSpec.Http or compilation fails.

key_file_guides.role: CustomerAccess and customer-scoped access-check endpoints (getCustomerAccess, getCustomerEntitlementValue) at /api/v1/customers/{customerIdOrKey}.
key_file_guides.watch_for: CustomerAccess.entitlements is Record<EntitlementValue> — splitting it into a typed map requires updating all SDK consumers.

anti_patterns: Adding new V1 operations or models here instead of the v2/ sub-folder — all V1 entitlement APIs are deprecated
Adding an entitlement variant to only one of Entitlement / EntitlementCreateInputs — both must change atomically
Omitting the #deprecated + #suppress pair on new V1 symbols — causes warnings that break make gen-api
Defining models without @friendlyName — autogenerated names can clash with V2 names in the same namespace
Adding HTTP decorators in a .tsp file without import "@typespec/http" and using TypeSpec.Http — compilation failure

decisions.decision: V1 symbols kept but fully deprecated in favour of v2/ equivalents
decisions.rationale: A deprecation window is needed; #deprecated annotations let the compiler warn SDK consumers while the generator still emits the endpoints for backward-compatible clients.

decisions.decision: OmitProperties composition instead of standalone read-model redefinitions
decisions.rationale: Avoids maintaining parallel create/read hierarchies; the read model reflects create-input changes automatically unless explicitly omitted.

decisions.decision: One shared EntitlementValue across all entitlement types with optional type-specific fields
decisions.rationale: A uniform /value response shape (shared hasAccess + optional metered balance/usage/overage) reduces client branching.
